items.content:
About This Role

We are hiring a UX Researcher to deepen our understanding of customers and inform product strategy through rigorous research. You will plan and conduct studies across the entire product lifecycle, from early-stage discovery to evaluative testing of shipped features.

Working closely with product designers, product managers, and engineers, you will ensure that our decisions are grounded in real user needs and behaviors rather than assumptions.

Responsibilities

  • Plan and conduct qualitative and quantitative research studies (interviews, surveys, usability tests, card sorts)
  • Synthesize research findings into clear, actionable insights and recommendations
  • Build and maintain user personas, journey maps, and other research artifacts
  • Establish and promote research best practices across the organization
  • Manage participant recruitment and maintain a research participant panel
  • Present findings to stakeholders and advocate for user-centered design

Requirements

  • 3+ years of UX research experience in a product-driven organization
  • Proficiency with a range of research methodologies (qualitative and quantitative)
  • Experience with tools like UserTesting, Dovetail, Optimal Workshop, or similar
  • Strong analytical skills and ability to synthesize complex data
  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills

Nice to Have

  • Experience researching enterprise or B2B SaaS products
  • Background in behavioral science, HCI, or cognitive psychology
  • Experience with data analysis tools (R, Python, SPSS)
